{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Sage of Steel Dust
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Dreadgod (novel)|Dreadgod]]
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Sage of Steel Dust]] wears a white circle.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
